vibe: Futuristic, premium, technical, startup-level professional (Linear / Vercel style)

mono.usage: Overlines, labels, code snippets, metrics, numbers

bento_grid.marketing: Mode A: 'Tetris' grid. Asymmetrical, gap-8 to gap-12, col-span mixing.
bento_grid.dashboard: Mode B: 'Control Room' grid. Tight packing, gap-4 to gap-6, full height usage.

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous (p-8 to p-12) for marketing cards. Ensure internal padding prevents text from touching borders.
spacing_and_layout.corners: Rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). Sharp edges emphasize the high-contrast technical feel.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with 1px delicate border-white/10 at the bottom.
surfaces.cards: Flat #141414 background, 1px border #27272A, no drop shadows. Use inner glow or Tracing Beam on hover.

buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#27272A] text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-none

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and cards should lift slightly (-translate-y-1). Border color brightens on hover.

components.marketing: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for organic, asymmetrical layouts. No Shadcn wrappers.
components.dashboard: Use heavily customized Shadcn components (tables, calendars, dialogs, recharts). Strip Vercel-look to match Archetype 4.
components.charts: Shadcn charts or Recharts. Ensure tooltips use dark surface colors and bright accent lines.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a kebab-case, role-based data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button').

hero_backgrounds.description: Monochrome geometric abstract background with polygonal shapes creating a 3D effect.

dashboard_illustrations.usage: Feature card illustration for resume analysis or AI interview.

dashboard_illustrations.description: Person sitting in front of laptop.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk. Enforce Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Satoshi for body. Add them via Google Fonts or standard imports.
Adhere STRICTLY to the Dark Theme Archetype 4. Do not use generic purple or violet gradients. Use the defined palette: #0C0C0C base, #E6FF00 accent.
Marketing Landing Page: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structure. Build asymmetrical 'Tetris' grid layouts with generous spacing.
Dashboard: Implement Mode B 'Control Room' grids. Customize Shadcn UI components heavily to match the stark, high-contrast aesthetic (sharp corners, thin borders, no generic shadows).
Ensure all overlay images in hero sections use max bg-black/50 so the image remains visible.
Every interactive element MUST have a kebab-case data-testid (e.g., data-testid='upload-resume-button').
Media urls provided in this JSON must be used exactly as specified. Do not substitute with placeholders.
